Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories , Set One, And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Theresa Baumgartner, Esq., for Cross-Defendant and moving party: Waterwoks, Inc.
Gregory Carpenter, Esq., appearing by telephone, for Cross-Complainant and opposing party: Icom Mechanical, Inc.

After hearing, Cross-Defendant Waterworks, Inc.'s Motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories [Set one] and request for sanctions is granted. All objections waived except attorney client and attorney work product privileges, and reports or opinions of retained experts. Incom Mechanical to provide full, complete and verified responses by 10/28/08. Sanctions sahll issue in the sum of $750 against party, stayed to 10/28/08; if defendant provides responses as ordered, sanctions permanently stayed. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
